title: MuslinZ Ex Large Muslin Cloths for Baby - Newborn Baby Essentials - Baby Swaddle -Bamboo Mix, Soft and Breathable (White)
features: EXTRA LARGE MUSLIN SQUARE- 120cms x 120cms 70% Rayon from Bamboo - 30% Organic Cotton

MULTI-PURPOSE NEWBORN BABY ESSENTIAL - This large size muslin square can be so useful with a newborn and beyond. Use as a Receiving Blanket, Swaddle, Lightweight Moses Blanket or Sheet, Coverup when Feeeding, Cuddle Blanket, Towel, as so much more
QUALITY FABRIC - This MuslinZ range is made of 2ply muslin fabric 70% Bamboo for softness and 30% Organic Cotton for easy washing and drying. The Perfect combination.

UK BRAND - MuslinZ is a UK brand based in Oxfordshire UK. All our designs are unique to our brand. All our products are made to Oeko-Tex 100 Standard, ethically and in ISO and Oeko-Tex certified factories. MuslinZ is a brand you can trust to provide safe, good quality at affordable prices for your precious little one.
description: EX large 120x120cms Muslin Squares. MuslinZ are a parenting essential for your new baby’s everyday needs. made from 70% bamboo/ 30% organic cotton, our MuslinZ bamboo swaddles are luxuriously soft with the qualities of bamboo and the added strength of organic cotton, ultra- absorbent and wonderfully soft for your baby's delicate skin. Swaddling, nursing cover, lightweight blanket, receiving blanket, mosses basket blanket or sheet, towel and many more uses. Machine washable at 30c, quick drying, breathable and softer with every wash.
